channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

1. Pokémon Pokopia Sped Through Development Thanks To Some Good Old Collaboration  Nintendo Life
  2. What is Pokopia? Inside the calming Pokémon game that ditches battles for gardening  The Guardian
  3. All Pokemon in Pokopia - Pokemon Pokopia Guide  IGN
  4. Pokémon Pokopia Made A Good Choice For Multiplayer With A Caveat  Kotaku
  5. Pokémon Pokopia Countdown: Exact Release Date & Start Times  Insider Gaming

item.title: UK's Advertising Standards Authority bans Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 commercial for "trivializing sexual violence" - GamesIndustry.biz
item.description:
1. UK's Advertising Standards Authority bans Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 commercial for "trivializing sexual violence"  GamesIndustry.biz
  2. Call of Duty Black Ops 7 ad banned for trivialising sexual violence  BBC
  3. Call of Duty ad banned in the UK for trivializing sexual violence  Game Developer
  4. Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 Commercial Featuring Nikki Glazer Receives UK Ban for Trivializing Sexual Violence  IGN
  5. Video game advert banned for glorifying sexual violence  The Independent
